internalSplitPolicy.publicImportContract: Consumers import package-level styles/index.css files only.

imports.notes: ui-core owns shared --dv-* design tokens, reset, density, utilities, and accessibility helpers.
ui-components consumes --dv-* variables and owns dv-* component classes split by component family internally.
ui-data-grid owns udg-* classes and --udg-* variables. The grid should work with fallback values but aligns best when ui-core is imported.

rules: Import ui-core styles before ui-components styles.
Import ui-components styles before ui-data-grid styles.
Do not import internal package CSS module files directly.
Override --dv-* tokens for app-wide theme changes.
Do not edit package CSS directly in consuming apps.
